_comment: Live build state. Primary writes on every state transition. For full narrative context see STATE.md.

2_2_classify_book_skill.notes: claude -p invocation pattern pinned at build/pins/claude-code.md: --system-prompt-file SKILL.md --model haiku.

2_4_library_watcher.notes: 98 supported files on real library scan. Calibre 9.7.0 installed.

2_7_book_note_skills.notes: argument/narrative/poetry templates; preamble guard 'first character must be #'.

4_1_regen_profile_skill.notes: Directive-boundary principle established: command-like inbox content must not auto-promote to [directive]; promotion only via correct().

4_2_profile_regen_handler.notes: Monthly launchd cron. _invoke_skill testing seam. Corpus sampler covers kindle + kindle_highlight.

4_3_correct_tool.notes: Atomic writes. Profile + book targets initially; judge_serendipity target added in 4.3+ extension.

4_3_plus_correct_judge_extension.notes: correct() target_type='judge_serendipity' lets users tune ambient surfacing in-chat.

4_4_judge_serendipity_skill.notes: strip_code_fences tolerance helper — Haiku wraps JSON in code fences inconsistently.

4_5_surface_tool.notes: Two-pass filter. Reuses judge's strip_code_fences helper.

4_6_custom_instructions.notes: User to refine in claude.ai chat. Only useful once claude.ai can reach the server — see Phase 6.

5a_audiobookshelf_handler.notes: mutagen==1.47.0. Migration 0004 adds audiobook_path + narrator. Jaccard 0.70 fuzzy merge against storygraph_entry. 335 jobs enqueued 12:30, sit behind library drain (FIFO).

5b_movies_tv_tmdb.notes: parse-torrent-title==2.8.2. Migration 0005 adds media_type, release_year, season_count, director, genres, plot, tmdb_id, filesystem_path. Dry-run: 374 movies + 61 TV = 435 items, 0 unparseable. TMDB key resolved — present in login keychain (service 'commonplace-tmdb-api-key', account 'tmdb'). 435 jobs queued behind library drain + audiobooks + enrichment (FIFO).

5c_book_enrichment.notes: No API keys required. Migration 0006 adds description, subjects, first_published_year, isbn, enrichment_source, enriched_at. Google Books cached at ~/.cache/commonplace/google_books/. 670 jobs queued behind library drain + audiobooks (FIFO).

5_scanners_launchd.notes: All three daily-at-04:xx, idempotent skip-if-ingested, clean exit when drive unmounted. All three visible in `launchctl list`; next firings tomorrow 04:00/04:15/04:30.

6_a_mcp_json.notes: Project-scope config at repo root: commonplace -> http://127.0.0.1:8765/mcp (type=http). CLI needs restart from repo root to load; approval prompt fires once.

6_launchd_mcp_server.notes: Uses .venv/bin/python -m commonplace_server. KeepAlive + RunAtLoad. Env: COMMONPLACE_DB_PATH, COMMONPLACE_HOST=127.0.0.1, COMMONPLACE_PORT=8765. Logs at ~/Library/Logs/commonplace-mcp-server.{out,err}.log. Verified healthy post-load (healthcheck 200).

6_c_funnel_claude_ai.notes: Auth landed via 6_auth (URL-path secret). Plan: tailscale funnel --bg --https=8443 http://127.0.0.1:8765 -> https://plex-server.tailb9faa9.ts.net:8443/mcp/<token>/. Paste full token-suffixed URL into claude.ai custom-connector config (Max/Team tier). Port 443 taken by Plex/audiobookshelf Funnel (-> 127.0.0.1:13378) — do not disturb. Ports 8443 and 10000 free.

6_auth.notes: URL-path secret chosen because claude.ai's custom-connector UI only supports OAuth 2.1 or bare URL — no custom headers. OAuth shim overkill for single-user system. FastMCP 2.13.1's mcp.run(path=...) parameter handles dynamic mount paths natively. Token resolution order: env var COMMONPLACE_MCP_TOKEN -> keychain. Mirrors TMDB keychain pattern (works under launchd context). User must restart Claude Code CLI from repo root after this commit to pick up new .mcp.json URL.

embedding_progress_tool.notes: In-progress from prior session, cleaned up + committed during Phase 7 preflight. Pure logic decoupled from FastMCP; thin wrapper in server.py registers MCP tool. Answers drain-visibility questions (by_status, in_flight jobs with running_for_seconds, recently_completed, recent_throughput).

lit_plan.notes: Draft 1 of the liturgical-ingest technical plan. All §6 open questions resolved (Q6 Byzantine calendar deferred with Jordanville). Pilot is Anglican-only (BCP 1979 + LFF 2022). Sidecar-table schema over shared documents. One-document-per-liturgical-unit to survive chunker merge floor. Composed-embedding strategy (option Y) for short units.

lit_0_1_migration.notes: Three sidecar tables + 8 indexes per plan §2.1. CASCADE delete from documents, self-referential FK on feast.cross_tradition_equivalent_id. PRAGMA integrity_check ok. schema_version bumps to 7.

lit_0_2_validator.notes: Pydantic v2 models (SubjectDef, TheologicalSubjectsFile, FeastEntry). validate_feasts() collects all errors before raising FeastValidationError. Controlled vocabulary with _other: escape hatch per plan §6 Q5. Format-only date_rule regex (accepts '13-01' — calendar semantics out of scope for validator).

lit_0_3_import_cli.notes: Two-pass idempotent upsert keyed on (primary_name, tradition). First pass inserts rows + builds slug→id map; second pass resolves cross_tradition_equivalent. Flags: --dry-run, --db, --ignore-missing-cross-refs, --feasts, --subjects. Follow-up: a UNIQUE index on feast(primary_name, tradition) would speed upserts at scale — surfaced but out of scope for pilot.

lit_0_4_calendar_stub.notes: movable_feasts_for_year via dateutil.easter (EASTER_WESTERN/EASTER_ORTHODOX switch). resolve_fixed_date + resolve_movable_date + resolve (union). LFF 2022 precedence ladder deferred to Phase 4 task 4.5 per plan §2.5. Two targeted type: ignore comments where dateutil stubs don't narrow EASTER_WESTERN to the expected Literal.

lit_0_5_subject_frequency_tool.notes: Follows embedding_progress pattern: pure logic in module, thin wrapper in server.py. Tool registered as 'subject_frequency' (required rename from agent's default 'subject_frequency_tool' to match plan §2.6). Malformed feast.theological_subjects JSON skipped with warning — read-only audit tool, permissive.

lit_0_6_subjects_yaml.notes: User authoring in claude.ai. Starter controlled vocab (~25–30 subjects) per plan §6 Q5. File path: commonplace_db/seed/theological_subjects.yaml (currently empty list).

lit_0_7_feasts_yaml.notes: User authoring in claude.ai. ~200–300 entries: BCP Principal Feasts + Sundays + Holy Days + LFF 2022 commemorations + Byzantine equivalents. File path: commonplace_db/seed/feasts.yaml (currently empty list). Import via `make seed-feasts-dry` → `make seed-feasts`.

lit_0_8_tests.notes: Unit tests rolled in with each task: 15 + 29 + 27 + 29 + 11 = 111 new tests total; 954/954 suite green.

open_questions: Profile current.md bootstrap — user is seeding on the side; regen handler (4.2) handles both existing-current-md and first-run cases.

blocked.reason: waiting on library drain + Kindle backfill + Bluesky backfill
green-lit by user 2026-04-16 — waiting on library drain to avoid Ollama contention
green-lit by user 2026-04-16 — waiting on library drain to avoid Ollama contention

deferred.notes: app password rotation disregarded per user

decisions_made.summary: hybrid chunker (paragraph->512/64 window), sqlite-vec vec0 virtual table, 768-dim nomic-embed-text

MCP exposure sequence: path A (Claude Code CLI via .mcp.json) first, launchd for persistence, path C (claude.ai via Tailscale Funnel on 8443) gated behind auth. Path B (Claude Desktop) skipped as redundant.

MCP auth design: URL-path secret (not header, not OAuth). Forced by claude.ai's custom-connector UI which only supports OAuth 2.1 or bare URL — no custom-header config. Ruled out Tailscale-only because claude.ai web + iOS reachability is a hard requirement. Ruled out OAuth shim as overkill for single-user system. Funnel's TLS encrypts the path in transit; rotation via make mcp-token-rotate.

recent_completions.gates: 954/954 suite, ruff + mypy clean, make smoke green. 6 commits: bf2a4f0 (plan) → 2ef0e33 (0.1 migration) → 2cb17af (0.2 validator) → 3f206ae (0.4 calendar) → 7e56973 (0.5 subject_freq tool) → 94b0a91 (0.3 import CLI). 111 new tests across Phase 0. Awaiting user seed authoring (0.6/0.7) out-of-band; Phase 1 Wave 1A (1.1 + 1.8) ready to dispatch.
7 new tests, ruff + mypy clean; commit 6b58b0e. Pre-Phase-7 cleanup of prior-session in-progress work.
